notableEvents.label: Jose Siri grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri hits a grand slam (2) to left center field. Jorge Soler scores. Jo Adell scores. Oswald Peraza scores.

notableEvents.label: Nick Madrigal reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Madrigal reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Willi Castro.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza steals (7) 2nd base. Vaughn Grissom scores. Oswald Peraza to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Hunter Goodman.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza steals (7) 2nd base. Vaughn Grissom scores. Oswald Peraza to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Hunter Goodman.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Vaughn Grissom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vaughn Grissom grounds into a double play, second baseman Chad Stevens to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Mike Trout out at 2nd. Vaughn Grissom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jose Siri GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Angels challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Jose Siri grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Oswald Peraza out at 2nd. Jose Siri out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by first baseman Vaughn Grissom on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Madrigal reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Willi Castro.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros plunked
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros hit by pitch. Sterlin Thompson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Kyle Freeland. Vaughn Grissom to 2nd. Vaughn Grissom advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Kyle Freeland.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza steals (7) 2nd base. Vaughn Grissom scores. Oswald Peraza to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Hunter Goodman.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kyle Karros.

notableEvents.label: Chad Stevens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Chad Stevens flies out to left fielder Jose Siri.
